title: Scroll of Myriad Bloodlines
landing_text: Bloodlines gathered from records both confirmed and questionable — organized by the grade of power they carry, from those barely perceptible in the blood to those that have shaped the course of entire ages. A bloodline cannot be chosen, but understanding what one carries — or what one might encounter — is knowledge worth having. What is written here is what I have been able to verify. There is more I have not.
